title: Sealapack Sandwich Bags - Resealable and Reuseable | 16.5cm x 15cm (40 Pack)
features: AIRTIGHT SEAL FOR MAXIMUM FRESHNESS: These sandwich bags feature an airtight seal that locks in freshness, ensuring your food stays crisp and delicious for longer. Perfect for packing sandwiches, snacks, or even chopped fruit for smoothies. No more soggy sandwiches or stale snacks!

REUSEABLE & DURABLE: Designed for multiple uses, these food bags are made from strong, durable plastic that can be washed and reused again and again. Great for reducing plastic waste while keeping food storage affordable and practical. Perfect for anyone looking to make eco-friendly choices in their household essentials.

PERFECT FOR FREEZER STORAGE: Whether you're prepping meals ahead of time or freezing leftovers, these freezer bags are a lifesaver. The airtight seal ensures that your food stays fresh and free from freezer burn, making them ideal for long-term storage in your fridge freezer.

CONVENIENT FOR TRAVEL: Not just for the kitchen! These bags make fantastic travel bags for snacks, toiletries, or even small accessories. Keep your suitcase organised on your next trip or pack healthy snacks for a day out. They're versatile enough for both food storage and non-food items.

SPACE SAVING & COMPACT: These bags are perfectly sized at 16.5cm x 15cm, making them great for portion control and fitting neatly in your fridge or freezer. Say goodbye to bulky containers taking up too much space. These food bags are the ultimate fridge organisers!
description: Product Description Sealapack Reusable Sandwich Bags are the ultimate kitchen and travel companion, designed to keep your food fresh, your fridge organised, and your life hassle-free. With an airtight seal that locks in freshness, these versatile bags are perfect for storing everything from sandwiches to freezer meals, and even household essentials. Whether you're meal prepping for the week, organising your fridge freezer, or packing snacks for a day out, these durable, reusable food bags make it simple and convenient. Their 16.5cm x 15cm size makes them the perfect fit for sandwiches, snacks, and more. With 40 bags per pack, each one is easy to open and close thanks to the smart press-seal feature. They can be reused again and again, offering both practicality and an eco-friendly option for everyday use. These food bags are also freezer-friendly, allowing you to store food for later without the worry of freezer burn. So, whether you're a busy parent, a meal-prepper, or just someone looking to keep food fresh longer, Sealapack sandwich bags are your go-to solution.
